title: Tick Control in Rutherford, NJ | $125 - $325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Rutherford, NJ starting at $125. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Same-day service available. Call now!
intro: Rutherford, New Jersey residents face increasing tick populations due to the borough's numerous parks, tree-lined streets, and proximity to the Passaic River. Our professional tick control services protect Rutherford families and pets from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses with treatments ranging from $125 to $325. We provide comprehensive yard treatments that create a safe outdoor environment for your home.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC serves Rutherford with EPA-approved tick treatments and experienced technicians who understand the unique challenges of Bergen County's tick populations. Our targeted approach focuses on high-risk areas around your property, and we offer seasonal protection plans to keep your yard tick-free year-round.
localContext: Rutherford's beautiful residential neighborhoods, proximity to Lincoln Park and Memorial Park, and abundance of mature trees create ideal habitats for deer ticks and dog ticks. Homes near the Passaic River banks and properties with wooded edges require particular attention during peak tick season from April through October.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Rutherford, NJ?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Rutherford typically runs from April through October, with peak activity in May, June, and July. However, ticks can be active year-round during mild winters, so year-round vigilance is important for Rutherford residents, especially those near wooded areas or parks.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Rutherford?
faqs.answer: Tick control services in Rutherford range from $125 to $325 depending on property size, severity of infestation, and treatment frequency. Most residential properties require treatments every 4-6 weeks during peak season for optimal protection. We offer free inspections and customized quotes for Rutherford homeowners.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered tick control products that are safe for children and pets when applied correctly. We recommend keeping kids and pets inside during application and for 2-3 hours afterward until the treatment dries. Our technicians will provide specific safety instructions for your Rutherford property.

faqs.question: What areas of my Rutherford property should be treated for ticks?
faqs.answer: We focus on high-risk areas including lawn perimeters, wooded edges, stone walls, ornamental plantings, and shaded areas where ticks thrive. Properties in Rutherford near Memorial Park, the Passaic River, or with mature landscaping require special attention to transition zones between lawn and wooded areas where ticks are most prevalent.
